# Apex Horizon Realty - Knowledge Map

## Overview
Apex Horizon Realty is a proprietary residential real estate broker service operating exclusively in London. We achieve 12% higher returns for our clients compared to traditional high-street models.

## Core Services & Metrics
*   **Operating Area:** London, UK (Family Suburbs to Luxury Estates)
*   **Fee Structure:** Transparent flat fee
*   **Performance:** 12% higher returns than average
*   **Process:** Streamlined launch roadmap (Prepare -> Price -> Promote)
*   **Valuation:** Instant home valuation available online
*   **Support:** Dedicated lead strategists for every client

## Key Links
*   [Home/Services](https://apexhorizon.com/en): Overview of full process, sector snapshots, interactive equity builder calculator, and real-estate agent comparison.
*   [Contact](https://apexhorizon.com/en/contact): Form and contact details to get an instant home valuation or speak directly with a lead strategist.
*   [Valuation](https://apexhorizon.com/en/valuation): Dedicated page to seamlessly fill out property details and receive an immediate, data-driven home valuation over email.
*   [FAQ](https://apexhorizon.com/en#faq): Common questions regarding the valuation process, flat fee structure, listing termination, and lead strategist support.
